name: GPU Compute — generic WGSL dispatch (wgpu-native)
description: Dispatches an arbitrary WGSL compute kernel on the native GPU via lib/gpu.rae (the generic device/buffer/kernel/dispatch seam over wgpu-native): builds an input array in Rae, runs out[i] = i*i + 1 on the GPU, reads it back and verifies. Not a raytracer — proves the abstraction is general. Headless, compiled-target only; needs wgpu-native.
